pages.text:
given me nurofen, Simon has given me 2 glasses of Cremant de Bourgogne & it's wonderful to have no pain.
	Tinder is awful at pulling on the lead when we're near sheep.
	Topiaried hedges with peacocks. The land lady & husband (who died 2 years ago) have been there 50 years.
	A DoE Bronze group were there.

__Saturday~~ Sunday__
	Lovely sunny morning. We sat & chatted & read after breakfast. The DoE children formed a line & swept thro meadow looking for tith litter. After coffee we walked across the reservoir bridge. Then we had lunch & left. Tinder was behaving better by the end of the holiday.

__Saturday May 25th__ Peter's birthday.
11 Simon, Eve & Tinder left to go to Ansted so that Annette can chat with her executors, Kate (with baby Milo) & Eve. Kate, Annette & Eve meet on the Saturday. Pernille joined
